block_00: Ready to get back on track?
block_01: Here are the 3 steps to start off on the right foot
block_03: We hope you had the best holiday time! Ready to get back to work with renewed vigor? Here is a quick checklist for a fresh start of the new year.
block_05: We updated the list of the most profitable countries in accordance with the new stats. So, which countries perform best depending on the instrument and device type? Proceed to the Cabinet to find that out.
block_08: We have designed some new juicy banners for your return. Choose the ones that you like and attract even more new users.
block_12: Even the best campaigns need a facelift after a while. Update creative elements such as banners, landing pages, images, and videos in your existing campaigns to the newer ones. It's also a good idea to post a piece of fresh content too, for example, "A 2021 platform overview".
block_13: Now when everything is double-checked and in order, you are ready for a fresh restart.
